findings.description: WebView_CustomTagConfig is referenced in s5 content (for both yyyymmdd and decimal valueFormat descriptions) but is absent from s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source textタグ section: ':ref:`WebView_CustomTagConfig` を使用してパターンのデフォルト値を設定することができる。' (yyyymmdd) and ':ref:`WebView_CustomTagConfig` を使用して、区切り文字"|"の変更を行うことができる。' (decimal)

findings.description: BigDecimalConvertor, IntegerConvertor, LongConvertor are mentioned in s5 content as the convertor classes to use with decimal valueFormat, but none appear in s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source textタグ section note: ':ref:`数値コンバータ(BigDecimalConvertor、IntegerConvertor、LongConvertor)<validator_and_convertor>`'
